# Fingal Amatsu Alignment Clinic

> Professional Amatsu therapy in Fingal, Dublin. A gentle, non-invasive Japanese bodywork therapy that supports postural alignment, natural healing, pain relief, and overall wellbeing.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the clinic, Amatsu therapy benefits, and booking information.
- [About](/about): About Robbie, the practitioner, the clinic, and our holistic approach to healing.
- [The Method](/the-method): The principle of mechanical alignment, the 6-session journey, and the conditions Amatsu addresses.
- [Success Stories](/success-stories): Client reviews and outcomes from Amatsu therapy sessions.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about bookings, fees, sessions, pregnancy, and safety.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, email, opening hours, and clinic location in Blanchardstown, Dublin D15.
